config.content.title: Frequently asked questions
config.content.description: Everything you need to know about VaultPay. Can't find the answer? Contact our support team.
config.faq.items:
How secure is my account with VaultPay?|Your account is protected by bank-grade 256-bit AES encryption, two-factor authentication, biometric login, and real-time fraud monitoring. We are PCI DSS Level 1 compliant and regulated by financial authorities.
Are there any hidden fees or charges?|No. VaultPay is committed to transparent pricing. All fees are clearly displayed before you confirm any transaction. Personal accounts enjoy zero monthly maintenance fees.
Which currencies and countries are supported?|We support 50+ currencies and operate in 150+ countries. Real-time exchange rates are provided with competitive spreads, and local payment methods are available in most regions.
What is the KYC verification process?|KYC (Know Your Customer) verification requires a valid government ID and proof of address. The process typically takes under 5 minutes with our AI-powered verification system.
How fast are international transfers?|Most international transfers arrive within seconds using our instant transfer network. Traditional wire transfers typically settle within 1-2 business days depending on the destination.
Is there a mobile app available?|Yes! VaultPay is available on iOS and Android with full feature parity. Download from the App Store or Google Play to manage your finances on the go.
